purebasicFormsDesigner.showGrid.descript: Show a grid in the designer canvas.
purebasicFormsDesigner.snapToGrid.descri: Snap gadget positions to the grid while dragging.
purebasicFormsDesigner.windowFillOpacity: Window background fill opacity inside the designer.
Optional CSS color for the designer background. Empty = use theme editor background.
purebasicFormsDesigner.canvasReadonlyBac: Optional CSS color for the designer background when form is read-only. Empty = use theme editor background.
purebasicFormsDesigner.snapMode.descript: Snapping behavior: live while dragging, or only on mouse release.
purebasicFormsDesigner.outsideDimOpacity: Dim opacity for the area outside the form window.
purebasicFormsDesigner.titleBarHeight.de: Title bar height drawn at the top of the form window (0 disables).
purebasicFormsDesigner.expectedPbVersion: Optional: show a warning when the .pbf header PureBasic version differs from this value. Empty disables the check.
purebasicFormsDesigner.newGadgetsUsePbAn: Create new gadgets with #PB_Any by default.
purebasicFormsDesigner.newGadgetsUseVari: Create new gadgets with a variable reference instead of a text literal caption by default.
purebasicFormsDesigner.generateEventProc: Enable event procedure generation by default for new forms.
purebasicFormsDesigner.osSkin.descriptio: Default operating system skin for the form preview.
purebasicFormsDesigner.warningUnrecogniz: Warning mode when opening a file that is not recognised as a Form Designer file.
purebasicFormsDesigner.warningVersionUpg: Warning mode when opening older Form Designer versions in a newer version.
purebasicFormsDesigner.warningVersionDow: Warning mode when opening newer Form Designer versions in an older version.
